title: HV and Beyond
discoveryHint: Reach HV to learn about advanced circuits.

sections.text: HV circuits require Plastic Circuit Boards, unlocking a dependency on Polyethylene production. SMD components (Resistors, Capacitors, Transistors, Diodes, Inductors) become available and are used for all subsequent tiers.
EV introduces the Cleanroom requirement for most circuit recipes. IV and beyond require increasingly complex processing chains, eventually needing the Assembly Line and Wetware processing.
